meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve no design skills (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no design skills. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Pricing Strategy for Freelancers: Advanced Checklist
content.seo_description: Overcome design limitations with professional SaaS pricing strategies. Master your workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code in this advanced developer guide.
content.answer_block: Stop letting design gaps stall your revenue. Leverage systematic pricing models—Tiered, Usage-Based, or Flat-Rate—to anchor client expectations. By automating your pricing logic with Antigravity and Claude Code, you transform abstract value into high-converting, programmatic UI components that require zero manual design effort while maximizing your recurring contract value.
content.intro:
You have the engineering chops to build a robust SaaS, but the blank canvas of a pricing page feels like a death sentence. You're a developer, not a UI designer, and every hour spent tweaking button shadows is an hour lost on high-leverage features. Clients don't pay for your CSS mastery; they pay for the ROI your pricing model helps them capture.

This guide is your tactical blueprint to bypass the 'design paralysis.' We are moving beyond guesswork. By treating pricing as a structural engineering problem rather than a design exercise, you can deploy professional, high-conversion pricing architectures that look intentional, clean, and enterprise-ready, even if you haven't touched Figma in months.

steps.title: Define the Value Metric
steps.description: Identify the primary unit of value for your SaaS. Is it seats, API calls, or storage? This dictates the logic structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a SaaS pricing consultant. Analyze the core value proposition of a B2B SaaS and output a JSON schema for three tiers: Starter, Pro, and Enterprise, focusing on usage-based metrics.

steps.title: Build the Pricing Engine Logic
steps.description: Create the backend logic that calculates costs dynamically, ensuring the UI reflects the server-side state without manual hardcoding.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a TypeScript pricing engine class that handles tiered discounts and usage-based calculations, returning a clean data object for the frontend.

steps.title: Generate Semantic UI Components
steps.description: Use AI to construct semantic HTML/Tailwind pricing cards that prioritize readability and hierarchy over decorative design.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive React pricing component using Tailwind CSS. Focus on a clean, minimalist design with a clear 'recommended' highlight for the middle tier.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ui generate PricingTable --style minimalist --framework react

steps.title: Implement Conversion Anchoring
steps.description: Add psychological 'nudges' like annual billing toggles to increase upfront cash flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add an annual/monthly toggle state to the existing React pricing component. Ensure it updates the displayed pricing dynamically using the engine logic.

steps.title: Automate Stripe Integration
steps.description: Connect your pricing logic directly to Stripe API to ensure the code and the payment gateway remain perfectly synced.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Stripe integration script that maps the generated pricing tiers to Stripe Product/Price IDs. Include error handling for subscription changes.

pro_tips: Always price your Enterprise tier as 'Contact Us' to capture high-intent leads that would otherwise bounce due to sticker shock.
Use semantic color coding for buttons: Primary blue for the 'Pro' tier, ghost buttons for others to guide the user's eye naturally.
Implement a 'Price Anchor' by placing your most expensive plan first if you want to make the middle tier look like a bargain.
Never hardcode prices in the UI; always fetch them from a configuration service or environment variable to allow for rapid A/B testing.
Include a 'What's included' tooltip on every feature row to remove friction and answer client objections before they even ask.
content.next_steps: Once your pricing architecture is live, implement a simple analytics event on the 'Sign Up' button to measure conversion rates and iterate your tier features based on actual user clicks.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical foundation to ship professional SaaS pricing without needing a design degree. Stop tinkering and start selling. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
